nodes.label: Diff View Screenshot - Dragit App UI showing inline diff with before/after toggle
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Dragit desktop app demonstrating the diff view feature. Shows a TypeScript interface 'Settings' with a code diff: removed fields 'fileOpenerApp: string' and 'openLastOnStart: boolean' (red/minus lines 16-17), added fields 'fileOpener: string' and 'openLastFolderOnStart: boolean' (green/plus lines 16-17), and unchanged field 'confirmDangerousActions: boolean' (line 18). A tooltip popup at the bottom shows three diff view mode options: 'Before changes', 'Inline changes' (currently active), and 'After changes'. Dark theme UI with macOS-style window chrome.
